cards.name: Standup
cards.upright: the team knows what you shipped; the PR arrives with context.
cards.reversed: silent drift; a change lands with no forewarning and reviewers scramble.

cards.name: Code Review
cards.upright: a careful set of eyes; the diff sharpens under attention.
cards.reversed: bikeshedding; reviewers argue color while the roof leaks.

cards.name: Friday Deploy
cards.upright: confidence born of tests and reversibility; the ship goes calmly.
cards.reversed: you know exactly why this is bad. do it Monday.

cards.name: Coffee
cards.upright: the author is caffeinated and clear-eyed; edge cases are named.
cards.reversed: over-brewed jitters; refactors sprawl beyond the ticket.

cards.name: On-Call
cards.upright: the change ships with a runbook; the pager sleeps.
cards.reversed: the alert queue senses fresh code and stirs.

cards.name: Retrospective
cards.upright: past failures inform this diff; the codebase grows wiser.
cards.reversed: the same mistake, again; muscle memory over reflection.
